thismatters.configuration.maxMatter.tool: Defines the maximum amount of matter until the Matter Compressor displays 100% [default: 150]
thismatters.configuration.minY.tooltip: Defines the minimum y level at which the Matter Compressor can work [default: 15]
thismatters.configuration.useDefaults.to: Use built-in matter checks when no item match is found using recipes [default: true]
thismatters.organic_matter_compressor.no: Pressure too low, try placing the block deeper
